privileged_info_summary: The teacher onboarding task requires adding staff member Jennifer Torres (email: jtorres@riverside.edu) as a Teacher, creating course Spanish III (code: SPAN301), and entering Placement Test grades for two 10th-grade students (Carlos Mendez: 82, Ana Nguyen: 89) in a simulated OpenSIS Student Information System. The task passes with a score of 60 or higher out of 100 points. All metadata claims are consistent across task description, setup scripts, verifier code, and documentation.
